::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\AddToShipoutPictureBG*{\AtPageUpperLeft{\includegraphics[width=\paperwidth,height=\paperheight]{images/ch4_cover.jpg}}}
\null
\newpage
\pagecolor{thesissand}
:::

# Structure over Material {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\vspace{1cm}
\begin{center}
\textit{Does shelter structure or material composition drive kōura refuge selection?}
\end{center}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
![](../images/ch4_cover.jpg){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

*Does shelter structure or material composition drive kōura refuge selection?*
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
![](../images/ch4_cover.jpg){fig-align="center" width=15cm}

*Does shelter structure or material composition drive kōura refuge selection?*
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\afterpage{\pagecolor{thesiscream}}
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}
